sections.paragraph:
Isa 27:1 Job 26:13, and בָּרִיחַ pl. בָּרִיחִים Isa 43:14 (for בַּרִיחַ, of the form צַדִּיק).-

(1) one who flees, a fugitive, Isa 43:14 also fleeing, an epithet of the serpent, both of the real creature, Isa 27:1 and of the constellation, Job 1:1.

(2) [Bariah] pr.n. m. 1Ch 3:22.
